results.title: Gloria Diaz calls Sen. Pia Cayetano ‘KSP,’ ‘madrama’
results.description: Miss Universe 1969 Gloria Diaz took aim at Sen. Pia Cayetano, describing her as “overly dramatic” and an “attention-seeker” in a comment that drew online attention. The former beauty queen made the remark after the senator issued a statement during the sixth day of Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial. During the trial, Pia spoke [...]...
